posts.author: siva
posts.text: Auto time based Kill Switch — Yes, as mentioned above we are working on this, will give option to set daily limit and link to kill switch, give us sometime.

posts.author: anusheel23
posts.text: Auto time based Kill Switch — @nithin I believe institutions succeed mainly for two reasons: They operate as market makers with deep capital and structural advantages. They rely on robust automated RMS systems that enforce risk controls without depending on human emotions during stressful situations. At the very least, brokers like Zerodha should provide a proper automated kill switch for daily and monthly loss limits. Personally, I’ve decided to step away from trading unless such systems become available. I know my weakness — overtrading during emotional phases - and it’s better to stay away…
